# CLAUDE.md

## Overview

The `tests/fixtures/realtime` directory documents the active-session and terminal-policy cases used for realtime parity.

## Index

| File | Contents (WHAT) | Read When (WHEN) |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `CLAUDE.md` | Realtime-fixture directory index and task map | Finding live-view fixture guidance quickly |
| `README.md` | Realtime fixture scenarios and sanitization notes | Updating active-session or terminal-policy coverage |
